title: SOP: Investigating a Failed Workflow
content:
Standard Operating Procedure for investigating workflow failures:

Step 1: Check workflow status using check_workflow_status(workflow_name). Note the error message and last execution time.

Step 2: Pull execution logs using get_execution_logs(workflow_name, execution_id). Look for the first ERROR line — that's usually the root cause.

Step 3: If the error mentions a file (FileNotFoundError, FileFormatError), use check_input_file to verify the input file exists and is valid.

Step 4: If the error is a timeout or connection error, use get_system_health to check if the AE platform is healthy. Also use check_agent_resources to verify the agent has sufficient CPU/memory.

Step 5: Check dependencies using get_workflow_dependencies. If upstream workflows failed, investigate those first.

Step 6: If root cause is identified and fix is straightforward (e.g., file arrived late), propose restart_execution. If the workflow is in PROTECTED_WORKFLOWS, escalate instead.

Step 7: After remediation, verify with check_workflow_status that the workflow is running/completed.
